spec.root_selector:
def hex2int:
  ascii_downcase | explode
  | reduce .[] as $c (0; . * 16 + (("0123456789abcdef"|explode) | index($c)));

.result
| ltrimstr("0x")
| .[0:64] as $w
| [ { Current: ($w | hex2int) } ]

def hex2int: ascii_downcase | explode | reduce .[] as $c (0; . * 16 + (("0123456789abcdef"|explode) | index($c)));
def words: [range(0; length; 64) as $i | .[$i:$i+64]];

.result
| map(
    . as $l
    | ($l.data | ltrimstr("0x") | words) as $w
    | {
        blockNumber: ($l.blockNumber | ltrimstr("0x") | hex2int),
        txHash: $l.transactionHash,
        validator: ("0x" + ($w[0][24:64])),
        epoch: ($w[1] | hex2int),
        validatorRewards: ((($w[2] | hex2int) / 1e18)),
        delegatorRewards: ((($w[3] | hex2int) / 1e18)),
        feeRewards: ((($w[4] | hex2int) / 1e18)),
        feePenalties: ((($w[5] | hex2int) / 1e18))
      }
  )
| sort_by(.blockNumber)
| (if length > 50 then .[-50:] else . end)
| reverse
